attributes.action: Improve NHS response times and follow-up for women’s health symptoms
attributes.additional_details: Many women are left waiting weeks or months while dealing with ongoing pain, bleeding, and other serious symptoms. Delays in follow-up, especially after abnormal test results, can cause distress and impact daily life. Women deserve to feel heard, supported, and receive timely care when seeking help.
attributes.background: Improve NHS response times and ensure faster follow-up for women with ongoing symptoms, including timely communication of abnormal test results, quicker GP review, and faster referral to specialists where needed.

rejection.details:
Petitions need to call on the Government or Parliament to take a specific action. We're not sure exactly what you'd like the Government or Parliament to do.

You may wish to sign this petition which calls for a similar action: Fund more NHS support for gynaecological disorders and reduce diagnosis delays https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/767477
